title: Reemployment
overview: Down on his luck and freshly unemployed Kentaro applies for one last job. He thinks he bombs the interview – but Manpuku Entertainment Productions has plans for him!

title: Company Housing
overview: Kentaro is hired along with other mid-career, middle aged men, to become a new idol group, the Eternal Boys! The group records their introduction to the world.

title: Work Commences
overview: The lessons for the debut of the Ossan Idol Project, Eternal Boys, began! But singing and dancing at the same time is hard.

title: The Kentaro Sanada
overview: A little liquid courage may be the key to unlocking idol worthy dance moves!

title: MV
overview: Today's agenda: making the Eternal Boys' first music video!

title: Makoto Kakizaki Special
overview: There are two kinds of humans: the ones who give, and the ones who receive.

title: The First Show
overview: What's more exciting than the Eternal Boys getting 100,000 views on their first video? Their first public performance, that's what!

title: CD Debut
overview: The boys have their first CD sales meeting. They also deal with living as roommates; who's wearing whose socks?!

title: The Dawn of Naoki Ishida
overview: Ishida recalls fond memories of the idol group, Gentlemen! Now he's in an idol group himself. Will these worlds collide?

title: Idol Festival
overview: The Men's Idol Fest only happens once a year and the Eternal Boys are making their way to its stage! It’s like being catapulted to the champions league!

title: Daisuke Yamanaka's Way
overview: An embarrassing blunder lands Yamanaka-san in hot water. It looks like things are about to go "kaboom!"

title: A Day Off
overview: Ima-chan's solo song "100% Your Personal Space" is beyond cute! The Eternal Boys get nitty gritty with lyrics.

title: Retirement
overview: Is Sanada really going to quit the Eternal Boys just when they're getting started?!

title: Mid-Term Hiring Exam
overview: Good news, everyone! Kakizaki is bringing a new member to the Eternal Boys!

title: The Continent of Passionate Tsuyoshi Imagawa
overview: You know the old saying: you can take the boy out of the idol, but you can't take the idol out of the boy!

title: Local Business
overview: Sometimes, you can't teach an old dog new tricks. Sometimes you can!

title: The History of Haru Asai
overview: Haru Asai grapples with his career as a professional soccer player turned middle-aged idol! It might be time once again to play ball!

title: Scandal
overview: The Eternal Boys browse the best website on the entire world wide web: the Eternal Boys' official fan site!

title: CM
overview: The Eternal Boys feel the love online from their fans! So does Manpuku Entertainment Productions' company cat, Pepechan!

title: Unprofitable Business
overview: Life as a middle-aged idol isn't all stage lights, show tunes and joint cream; the boys have some tough conversations.

title: From Nicolai Asakura's Car Window
overview: One of the Eternal Boys feels like he's going back to school. Imagine doing homework again. No thanks!

title: Album
overview: The Eternal Boys receive a package. But what's in the box?!

title: Budokan
overview: The Eternal Boys have been working toward this moment for their entire idol careers! It's time to perform!

title: Eternal Boys
overview: In the afterglow of their stage performance, what does the future hold for the Eternal Boys?
